hooks.command: branch=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); if [ "$branch" = "main" ] || [ "$branch" = "master" ]; then files=$(git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$files" ]; then first=$(echo "$files" | head -1); name=$(basename "$first" | sed 's/\.[^.]*$//'); count=$(echo "$files" | wc -l | tr -d ' '); if [ "$count" -gt 1 ]; then dir=$(dirname "$first"); [ "$dir" != "." ] && name="$(basename $dir)-${name}"; fi; else name="update"; fi; slug=$(echo "$name" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]' | tr -cs 'a-z0-9' '-' | sed 's/^-*//;s/-*$//' | cut -c1-35); new="feature/${slug}-$(date +%m%d-%H%M)"; git checkout -b "$new" 2>/dev/null && printf '{"systemMessage":"Auto-switched to new branch: %s"}' "$new"; fi
